subcodes.first_line: We testify that thine eye hath attained unto that for which it was created, and thine ear hath hearkened to the voice of the Wronged One in this Great Prison [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ح س نشهد ان عینک فازت بما خلقت له و اذنک سمعت ندآء المظلوم فی هذا السجن العظیم
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @power of prayer
